categories.description: Active ship-side actions — piloting under pressure, gunnery, jury-rigging in flight. Roll the relevant attribute. Failure adds 1 ship_wear.
categories.consequence_on_partial: ship_wear: +1 OR a complication on the action

categories.description: Learned trades and professional capabilities — medicine, social legwork, frontier survival. Triggered when the GM calls a roll on the most appropriate attribute. No special cost.

Active uses of recovered alien artifacts and the rare practitioner's intuition for them. Roll Edge. Failure inflicts heat (the wrongness echoes outward). Partial succeeds with a complication or unexpected side effect.
categories.consequence_on_partial: heat: +1 OR effect distorts in transit

categories.description: Permanent character features — backstory, lineage, signature gear. Passive; the GM applies their effect where relevant.
